## Purpose
This file defines TypeScript types and constants related to the structure of repository manifests and summary assets, facilitating type safety and consistency in handling these data structures.

## User-Visible Behavior
Users of this file will observe the availability of constants for schema versions and interfaces that define the structure of repository manifests and summary assets, which can be utilized in other parts of the application for type-checking and data validation.

## Business Rules
The file enforces specific schema versions for manifests and summary assets, ensuring that any data adhering to these interfaces conforms to the defined structure and types.

## Data Inputs And Outputs
Data entering this file includes the schema version constants and the structure definitions for repository manifests and summary assets. Outputs consist of the defined interfaces that can be used to create or validate objects representing these data structures.
